title: Ghestslayer
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Ghest.jpg|thumb|right|250px|A ghest, the target of a ghestslayer]]
'''Ghestslayer''' was an occupation on [[Rodia/Legends|Rodia]]. [[Rodian/Legends|Rodians]] choosing this job tracked down and [[Death/Legends|killed]] the dangerous [[Ghest/Legends|ghests]].<ref name="AIR">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref>

The Rodian [[Kalon Lenitor]] became legendary as a ghestslayer.<ref name="AIR" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-06-XX -->''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''
